text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, April 26. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and a quiet dinner with the family.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah found a new recipe to try. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Healthy choices are great. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Reading a new book before bed. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan is practicing Minuet in G for the upcoming piano recital. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. I've got the schedule covered. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've mapped the locations. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: The smart-home hub is acting up today. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Let's get that resolved. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Let's organize the menu. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Relaxation mode active. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Sounds exciting! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that having dinner with our friends tonight. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. That sounds like a sweet moment. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
